description_long: This object is a pair of wireless in-ear earbuds, designed with a sleek, glossy white plastic exterior and subtle black accent panels. Each earbud features a contoured stem and a rounded main body that fits into the ear canal, with visible speaker grilles and sensor areas. The stems are elongated and slightly curved, providing a comfortable grip for insertion and removal. The black sections likely house touch-sensitive controls or microphones for hands-free operation. The overall design is minimalistic and modern, reminiscent of popular consumer electronics brands. These earbuds are compact and lightweight, suitable for portable use in urban environments.
description: A pair of glossy white wireless in-ear earbuds with black accent panels and contoured stems, designed for portable audio use.
description_view_0: Two separate earbuds are shown from the side, highlighting the curved stems and black accent panels.
description_view_1: The earbuds are crossed, showing the rounded speaker ends and the black sensor or grille areas on the outer surface.
description_view_2: The rear and side of the earbuds are visible, emphasizing the smooth, contoured shape and the placement of the black accents.
description_view_3: The earbuds are crossed again, with a clear view of the oval-shaped black grille and the underside of the stems.
